ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition (1) To Recover Assets Of Trust And Estate. (2) Recovery Of Damages And Attrorneys Fees Under Probate Code Section 859. (3) For Breac
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Continued To Aug-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe, via Zoom, for Eric Rosenquist, Petitioner; John Streett, via Zoom, for Jane Eckert, Objector/Respondent.

The court queries counsel regarding participating in mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Aug-12-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Aug-19-2022. The Parties are to return on Aug-29-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The matter is continued to the same date. Counsel is to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the Minute Order Referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

Verified Petition (1) To Recover Assets Of Trust And Estate. (2) Recovery Of Damages And Attrorneys Fees Under Probate Code Section 859. (3) For Breac
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Continued To Apr-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Loew, via ZOOM, for Eric Rosenquist, Petitioner; John Streett, via ZOOM, for Jane Eckert, Respondent.

The court notes that there is a document pending in the court's e-filing queue and suggests a continuance to allow the court to review the document. No objections to the court's proposal are presented.

After brief discussion, the Verified Petition, etc., is continued to Apr-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
